subject: object reference not set to an instance of an object
body:
hi all, 

I do the usual tilt series pipeline from WARP to IMOD then re-import to 
WARP.  However when re-importing to WARP I get the error " object reference 
not set to an instance of an object".  I have 10 tomos and only 3 can be 
reimported.  No idea what is happening with the other 7.  Literally are all 
being treated identically.  

had this problem in the past and it still persists.  Previously I resolved 
it by using the nightly build, but that is not working anymore.  I am 
running 10.9, and when I ran nightly build 20201104 this solved the issue 
before.  However now when I try running with that version I get the error 
"Invalid URI : The URI is Empty".    

Thanks
